sentences.target: Je dispose les assiettes sur la table.

translations.fr: Je dispose les assiettes sur la table.
translations.en: I arrange the plates on the table.
translations.es: Coloco los platos en la mesa.
translations.de: Ich stelle die Teller auf den Tisch.
translations.he: אני מסדר את הצלחות על השולחן.
translations.nl: Ik zet de borden op tafel.
translations.hi: मैं मेज़ पर प्लेटें रखता हूँ.
translations.id: Saya menata piring di atas meja.
translations.ja: テーブルに皿を並べます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (1st person singular) referring to the speaker.
Main verb in present indicative (1st person singular), agrees with 'Je'; means to arrange/place.
Definite article (plural) introducing the direct object noun 'assiettes'.
Common noun (plural); direct object of 'dispose'.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase 'sur la table'.
Definite article (singular) determining the noun 'table'.
Common noun (singular); object of the preposition 'sur', indicating location.

sentences.target: On dispose les valises près du banc.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ dispoz le valiz pʁɛ dy bɑ̃/

translations.fr: On dispose les valises près du banc.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ dispoz le valiz pʁɛ dy bɑ̃/
translations.en: We arrange the suitcases near the bench.
translations.es: Colocamos las maletas cerca del banco.
translations.de: Wir stellen die Koffer in die Nähe der Sitzbank.
translations.it: Mettiamo le valigie vicino alla panchina.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们把行李箱放在长椅旁边。
translations.yue: 我哋將行李箱擺喺長櫈附近。
translations.ru: Мы ставим чемоданы рядом со скамейкой.
translations.pt: Colocamos as malas perto do banco.
translations.he: אנחנו מסדרים את המזוודות ליד הספסל.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đặt va li gần băng ghế.
translations.nl: We zetten de koffers bij het bankje neer.
translations.hu: A bőröndöket a pad közelébe tesszük.
translations.hi: हम बेंच के पास सूटकेस रखते हैं.
translations.el: Τοποθετούμε τις βαλίτσες κοντά στο παγκάκι.
translations.id: Kami menaruh koper di dekat bangku.
translations.ja: ベンチの近くにスーツケースを置きます。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as subject (generic ‘one/we’).
Main verb in present indicative (3rd person singular), agrees with 'On'.
Definite article (plural) introducing the direct object noun 'valises'.
Common noun (plural); direct object of 'dispose'.
Adverb forming the fixed expression 'près de', indicating proximity; modifies the verb phrase.
Contracted preposition 'de' + definite article 'le' in 'près du', linking the noun 'banc' as complement.
Common noun (singular); complement of the preposition group 'près du'.

sentences.target: Nous disposons les chaises en cercle.

translations.fr: Nous disposons les chaises en cercle.
translations.en: We arrange the chairs in a circle.
translations.de: Wir stellen die Stühle im Kreis auf.
translations.yue: 我哋將啲椅擺成一個圈。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi sắp xếp ghế thành vòng tròn.
translations.nl: We zetten de stoelen in een cirkel.
translations.hi: हम कुर्सियों को गोले में लगाते हैं.
translations.nb: Vi setter stolene i en sirkel.
translations.sv: Vi ställer stolarna i en cirkel.
translations.da: Vi stiller stolene i en cirkel.
translations.ja: いすを円形に並べます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun (1st person plural) serving as subject.
Main verb in present indicative (1st person plural), agrees with 'Nous'.
Definite article (plural) introducing the direct object noun 'chaises'.
Common noun (plural); direct object of 'disposons'.
Preposition introducing the prepositional phrase 'en cercle' that describes the configuration.
Common noun (singular); object of the preposition 'en', indicating arrangement shape.

sentences.target: Il faut disposer les plantes près de la fenêtre.
sentences.reading: /il fo dispoze lez‿plɑ̃t prɛ də la fənɛtʁ/

translations.fr: Il faut disposer les plantes près de la fenêtre.
translations.ipa: /il fo dispoze lez‿plɑ̃t prɛ də la fənɛtʁ/
translations.en: We need to place the plants near the window.
translations.es: Necesitamos colocar las plantas cerca de la ventana.
translations.de: Wir müssen die Pflanzen in die Nähe des Fensters stellen.
translations.it: Dobbiamo mettere le piante vicino alla finestra.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们需要把植物放在窗边。
translations.yue: 我哋要將啲植物擺喺窗邊。
translations.pt: Precisamos colocar as plantas perto da janela.
translations.he: אנחנו צריכים לשים את הצמחים ליד החלון.
translations.vi: Chúng ta cần đặt cây gần cửa sổ.
translations.ar: نحتاج إلى وضع النباتات قرب النافذة.
translations.nl: We moeten de planten bij het raam neerzetten.
translations.hu: A növényeket az ablak közelébe kell tenni.
translations.hi: हमें पौधों को खिड़की के पास रखना है.
translations.el: Πρέπει να τοποθετήσουμε τα φυτά κοντά στο παράθυρο.
translations.nb: Vi må plassere plantene ved vinduet.
translations.id: Kita perlu menaruh tanaman di dekat jendela.
translations.sv: Vi behöver ställa växterna nära fönstret.
translations.ro: Trebuie să punem plantele lângă fereastră.
translations.da: Vi skal placere planterne ved vinduet.
translations.fi: Meidän pitää laittaa kasvit ikkunan lähelle.
translations.ja: 窓の近くに植物を置く必要があります。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun (dummy subject) in the expression 'il faut'.
Impersonal verb (3rd person singular present) expressing necessity.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of 'faut' (what is necessary to do).
Definite article (plural) introducing the direct object noun 'plantes'.
Common noun (plural); direct object of the infinitive 'disposer'.
Adverb forming the fixed expression 'près de' indicating proximity; modifies the verb phrase.
Preposition linking the complement noun phrase in 'près de la fenêtre'.
Definite article (singular) determining the noun 'fenêtre'.
Common noun (singular); object of the preposition 'de' within the locative phrase.
